typical_relief_triggers: Safe platform sections between enemy waves
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Action platformer with alternating combat encounters and navigation challenges

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic platforming and combat mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy density and environmental complexity

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels progress through waves of standard enemies building toward a significant boss encounter that requires mastery of learned mechanics
Horizontal movement through stages with vertical platforming elements as secondary navigation challenge

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Mighty Morphin Power Rangers SNES article)

Level design patterns inferred from platformer genre conventions and limited explicit documentation. Rhythm and spacing data requires gameplay observation beyond available source material.
data_gaps: Tension cycle timing requires gameplay measurement
